hero.label: BeWorkingApp
hero.heading: Your digital office to run your business
hero.subheading: Clients, communications, tasks and automation — all connected in one place.

overview.heading: Business at a glance.
overview.body: See your activity, upcoming bookings, pending invoices, and recent mail from one unified screen. Built for daily use.

contacts.heading: Your full contact book.
contacts.body: Clients, leads, and partners — stored, tagged, and searchable. Linked to invoices, bookings, and communication history.

invoicing.heading: Invoicing without the overhead.
invoicing.body: Create, send, and track invoices with one click. PDF export, payment status, and billing history — all built in.

spaces.heading: Book the right room.
spaces.body: View available rooms, filter by capacity and features, and confirm a booking in seconds. No back-and-forth required.

mailbox.heading: Your mail, digitized.
mailbox.body: Physical mail received at your business address is scanned, named, and placed in your mailbox automatically.

settings.heading: Your account, your rules.
settings.body: Manage users, billing details, notification preferences, and integrations from one unified settings panel.

beSpaces.heading: Professional spaces for your team.
beSpaces.body: Book meeting rooms, desks, and coworking spaces in real time. Integrated with your digital office for a seamless experience.

integrations.heading: Connect your favorite tools.
integrations.body: Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Slack, Stripe and more — sync your external tools with your digital office. Everything in one place.

automation.heading: Automate your workflows.
automation.body: Create rules, triggers, and automatic actions to eliminate repetitive tasks. Your AI orchestrates it all for you.

spaceCatalog.heading: Explore all available spaces.
spaceCatalog.body: Browse the full catalog of rooms, desks, and offices. Filter by capacity, equipment, and price.

reports.heading: Data that drives decisions.
reports.body: Activity reports, space usage, billing, and team performance — all accessible from your dashboard.

productivity.heading: Your productivity stack, unified.
productivity.body: Connect Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Notion, and other tools your team uses daily. Documents, tasks, and projects — all visible from one place.

communication.heading: Every conversation, one inbox.
communication.body: Bring Slack, Microsoft Teams, Discord, and email into your BeWorking dashboard. Never miss a message, regardless of channel.

finance.heading: Financial tools, connected.
finance.body: Sync Stripe, Holded, BBVA, and your accounting tools. Invoices, payments, and reconciliation flow automatically into your dashboard.

calendar.heading: Calendars in sync.
calendar.body: Google Calendar, Outlook, and Cal.com — all merged into a single view. Bookings, meetings, and availability updated in real time.

storage.heading: Files from every cloud.
storage.body: Google Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive — access and manage files from any storage provider without leaving your workspace.

developer.heading: Built for technical teams.
developer.body: GitHub, GitLab, and n8n integrate directly. Automate workflows, track repos, and trigger actions from your dashboard.

departmentsCta.heading: 8 AI departments for your company.
departmentsCta.body: CRM, Accounting, HR, Projects, Marketing and more — each powered by AI and integrated with all major business apps.

cta.heading: Ready to run your business from one place?

hero.label: FAQ
hero.heading: Frequently asked questions.
hero.subheading: Everything you need to know about BeWorking.

items.a: BeWorking is the flexible offices platform. Coworking, meeting rooms and registered address in your city — all managed from a single app, no paperwork.
Yes, BeWorking is a 100% digital platform accessible from anywhere.
BeWorking is designed for freelancers, startups, remote teams, and established companies that need a professional business presence in Spain without the cost of a traditional office.
Create a free account to access all features.

items.q: Is BeWorking available in multiple languages?
items.a: Yes. The platform supports Spanish and English.

items.q: What types of spaces are available?
items.a: We offer coworking desks, private offices, meeting rooms, and training rooms at our Málaga location.

items.q: How do I book a space?
items.a: Open the BeWorking section in your dashboard or visit be-working.com. Select a date, time, and room type — then confirm.

items.q: Can I book a space without a subscription?
items.a: Yes. Day passes and individual room bookings are available without a monthly plan.
All spaces include high-speed WiFi, air conditioning, and access to common areas. Meeting rooms include a whiteboard.

items.q: How far in advance can I book?
items.a: There is no fixed advance booking limit. You can book at any time based on availability.
The platform includes a dashboard (overview), invoicing, file storage (mailbox), space booking, integrations, automations, reports, and settings — all in one place.
Not yet. The platform is fully responsive and works on mobile browsers. A native app is on the roadmap.

items.q: Can multiple users access the same account?
items.a: Yes. You can invite team members from the Settings panel and assign roles.
Yes. All invoices can be exported as PDF or downloaded in bulk from the Invoicing tab.
Your data is stored on secure AWS servers in the EU (Stockholm, eu-north-1 region).
We accept credit cards, debit cards, and bank transfers via Stripe.
Plans are billed monthly, quarterly, semi-annually, or annually. You can switch or cancel at any time from your account settings.

items.q: Can I get an invoice for my subscription?
items.a: Yes. Invoices are generated automatically and available in the Billing section of your account.
Prices shown are exclusive of VAT. VAT is applied at checkout based on your country of residence.

legal.disclaimerEn: This is a courtesy translation. In case of discrepancy, the Spanish version published at /politica-de-privacidad and /aviso-legal shall prevail.

aviso.title: Legal Notice and Terms of Use
aviso.intro: In compliance with Spanish Law 34/2002, of 11 July, on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE), the following identification details of the website operator are made available to users and competent authorities.
aviso.s1AddressValue: Calle Alejandro Dumas 17 - Oficinas, 29004 Málaga, Spain
aviso.s1RegistryValue: [Pending — volume, folio, sheet and date of registration in the corresponding Commercial Registry].
aviso.s2P1: This Legal Notice governs access to and use of the website be-working.com and its subdomains (the “Website”), owned by BeWorking Partners, S.L. (“BeWorking”). Accessing the Website and using its content and services implies full and unreserved acceptance of these terms by the user.
aviso.s2P2: Some services may be subject to particular conditions which, where applicable, will replace, complement or modify this Legal Notice and must be expressly accepted by the user prior to engagement.
aviso.s3Title: 3. Access and use of the Website
aviso.s3P1: Access to the Website is free, without prejudice to services that require prior registration or payment. The user agrees to use the Website and its services in accordance with the law, public order and these terms, refraining from using them for unlawful purposes or in ways that harm BeWorking or third parties.
aviso.s3P2: Where registration is required, the user undertakes to provide truthful, accurate and up-to-date information and to safeguard their access credentials, being responsible for any activity carried out under their account.
aviso.s4P1: All Website content — including, by way of example and without limitation, texts, photographs, graphics, images, icons, software, trade names, trademarks, logos and designs — is owned by BeWorking or, where applicable, by third parties that have authorised its use, and is protected by national and international intellectual and industrial property law.
aviso.s4P2: The reproduction, distribution, public communication, transformation or any other form of exploitation without prior written authorisation from the rights holder is expressly prohibited. Unauthorised use may give rise to applicable legal action.
aviso.s5P1: BeWorking does not guarantee the uninterrupted availability and continuity of the Website, nor the absence of errors in its content, although it will adopt reasonable technical measures to prevent, correct or update them.
aviso.s5P2: BeWorking shall not be liable for any damages whatsoever arising from the unavailability or discontinuity of the Website, nor from the presence of viruses or the unlawful introduction of programs into the user’s computer systems, provided it has adopted the technical measures required by the state of the art.
aviso.s6Body: The Website may contain links to third-party pages. BeWorking assumes no responsibility for the content, services or information hosted on those pages, nor for their technical availability, quality, reliability or accuracy. The inclusion of these links does not imply any relationship, recommendation or endorsement by BeWorking.
aviso.s7Body: The processing of personal data provided by the user through the Website is governed by the {{privacyLink}}. The use of cookies and similar technologies is governed by the {{cookiesLink}}.
aviso.s8Intro: The cancellation and refund conditions applicable to services contracted through the Website are as follows:
aviso.s8HourlyTitle: Hourly or daily bookings (meeting rooms, day offices, hot-desks)
aviso.s8HourlyB1Strong: Modifications and cancellations accepted up to 24 hours before
aviso.s8HourlyB1: the start, requested by email at info@be-working.com.
aviso.s8HourlyB2: Late cancellations or no-shows do not entitle the user to a refund or credit.
aviso.s8HourlyB3: As these are services provided on specific dates and times (art. 103.l of Royal Legislative Decree 1/2007), the right of withdrawal applicable to distance contracts does not apply.
aviso.s8SubsTitle: Subscriptions (virtual office, monthly or long-term plans)
aviso.s8SubsB1: Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period and must be communicated by email at least 7 days in advance.
aviso.s8SubsB2: No refunds are issued for periods already started or for fees corresponding to services already rendered.
aviso.s8SubsB3: On activating the subscription, the customer expressly requests immediate provision; pursuant to art. 103.a of Royal Legislative Decree 1/2007, once the service has been effectively rendered, any refund is limited to the amount corresponding to the unused period.
aviso.s8ModsBody: Date or time changes are subject to availability and confirmation by email. Acceptance of a modification does not constitute a customer right. BeWorking reserves the right to request formal justification of the reason for the modification.
aviso.s8ForceTitle: Cause attributable to BeWorking or force majeure
aviso.s8ForceBody: When the inability to provide the service results from a cause attributable to BeWorking or from force majeure (administrative closure of the centre, prolonged power failure or other causes not attributable to the customer), BeWorking will offer to relocate the booking to an alternative date or, at its discretion, refund the amount corresponding to the unprovided service.
aviso.s8RefundBody: Where applicable, refunds will be issued via the same payment method used in the original transaction, unless expressly agreed otherwise.
aviso.s9Body: BeWorking reserves the right to modify, at any time and without prior notice, the presentation, configuration and content of the Website, as well as these terms. The date of the last update appears at the top of this document.
aviso.s10Body: These terms are governed by Spanish law. For the resolution of any dispute arising from their interpretation or application, the parties submit to the courts of the user’s domicile when the user qualifies as a consumer. In all other cases, both parties expressly submit, waiving any other jurisdiction, to the courts of Málaga (Spain).
aviso.s11Body: For any questions regarding this Legal Notice, the user may contact BEWORKING OFFICES PARTNERS SL by email at

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy governs the processing of personal data that BEWORKING OFFICES PARTNERS SL collects through the website be-working.com and its associated services, in compliance with EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR) and Spanish Organic Law 3/2018 of 5 December on Personal Data Protection and Digital Rights (LOPDGDD).
privacy.s1AddressValue: Calle Alejandro Dumas 17 - Oficinas, 29004 Málaga, Spain
privacy.s1DpoValue: [Pending appointment, where mandatory under art. 37 GDPR].
privacy.s2Intro: Depending on the user’s relationship with BEWORKING OFFICES PARTNERS SL, the following categories of data may be processed:
privacy.s2B1: Identification and contact data: name, surname, tax ID, postal address, telephone and email.
privacy.s2B2: Professional data: company, position and billing details.
privacy.s2B3: Contractual relationship data: contracted services, bookings, billing and payment history.
privacy.s2B4: Browsing data: IP address, device identifiers, pages visited and data derived from cookies (see cookie policy).
privacy.s2B5: Communications: content of messages, forms and requests sent to us by the user.
privacy.s3Intro: Personal data is processed for the following purposes:
privacy.s3B1: Managing user registration, account and the provision of contracted services.
privacy.s3B2: Processing bookings, payments and the issuance of invoices.
privacy.s3B3: Handling enquiries, information requests and user communications.
privacy.s3B4: Complying with applicable legal obligations (tax, accounting and fraud prevention).
privacy.s3B5: Sending commercial communications about our services where there is a prior contractual relationship or the user has given express consent.
privacy.s3B6: Improving the operation of the website and analysing its use in aggregate form.
privacy.s4B1Body: (art. 6.1.b GDPR): for the provision of services and the management of the contractual relationship.
privacy.s4B2Body: (art. 6.1.c GDPR): for tax, accounting and commercial obligations.
privacy.s4B3Body: (art. 6.1.f GDPR): for handling enquiries, fraud prevention, network security and sending commercial communications about similar products to existing customers (art. 21.2 LSSI).
privacy.s4B4Body: (art. 6.1.a GDPR): for sending commercial communications to non-customers and for the use of non-essential cookies.
privacy.s5Body: Personal data will be retained for the time necessary to fulfil the purpose for which it was collected. Once that purpose has ended, data will be kept blocked during the legal limitation periods for liabilities arising from the processing (in particular, the periods established by tax, commercial and accounting regulations, generally up to six years).
privacy.s6Intro: Data may be shared with the following categories of recipients when necessary for the provision of the service or required by law:
privacy.s6B1: Service providers acting as data processors (hosting, email delivery, payment processors, analytics tools), with whom the corresponding processing agreements have been signed pursuant to art. 28 GDPR.
privacy.s6B2: Public administrations and competent authorities in compliance with legal obligations.
privacy.s6B3: Financial institutions and payment processors, where applicable, for the processing of payments.
privacy.s6Closing: No data sharing with third parties for commercial purposes is foreseen without the prior express consent of the data subject.
privacy.s7Body: Certain service providers may be located outside the European Economic Area. In such cases, BEWORKING OFFICES PARTNERS SL adopts the appropriate safeguards provided for by the GDPR (Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission or other valid mechanisms) to ensure a level of protection equivalent to that required by European law. Users may request further information about international transfers and applicable safeguards by writing to info@be-working.com.
privacy.s8Intro: Users may exercise at any time the rights granted by the GDPR and the LOPDGDD:
privacy.s8B1: Right of access to personal data.
privacy.s8B2: Right of rectification of inaccurate data.
privacy.s8B3: Right to erasure (“right to be forgotten”).
privacy.s8B7: Right not to be subject to automated decisions, including profiling, which produce legal effects or significantly affect the data subject.
privacy.s8B8: Right to withdraw consent, without affecting the lawfulness of processing prior to withdrawal.
privacy.s8Closing: To exercise these rights, users may send a communication to {{email}} indicating the right they wish to exercise and including a copy of an identification document.
privacy.s9Body: Data subjects have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD), located at C/ Jorge Juan, 6, 28001 Madrid ({{aepdLink}}), especially when they consider that they have not received satisfaction in the exercise of their rights.
privacy.s10Body: BEWORKING OFFICES PARTNERS SL applies the appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure a level of security commensurate with the risk of processing, in accordance with art. 32 GDPR, including, among others, encryption of communications, access control, backups and staff training.
privacy.s11Body: BEWORKING OFFICES PARTNERS SL may amend this Privacy Policy to adapt it to legislative or judicial developments or to its own practices. Where changes are substantial, the user will be informed through the usual channels and, where applicable, the necessary consent will be requested.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how cookies and similar technologies are used on be-working.com, in compliance with article 22.2 of Spanish Law 34/2002 on Information Society Services (LSSI-CE), the EU General Data Protection Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR), and Spanish Organic Law 3/2018 (LOPDGDD).
cookies.s1Body: A cookie is a small text file that a website saves in the user's browser or device on visit. Cookies allow the site to remember information about the visit — such as preferred language, login state, or cart items — and are useful for improving the user experience as well as for analytics or advertising purposes.
cookies.s2Body: Cookies are classified following the guidelines of the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD):
cookies.s2NecessaryBody: required for the service to function (authentication, security, consent management). Exempt from consent under art. 22.2 LSSI.
cookies.s2StatisticsBody: help us understand in aggregate how the site is used. Only activated with the user's explicit consent.
cookies.s2MarketingBody: we currently do not use marketing cookies or personalised advertising.
cookies.s3Note: Cloudflare Turnstile, used for anti-bot protection on forms, issues ephemeral tokens that are not stored as persistent browser cookies.

purposes.consent: Stores the user's consent state for cookies on this domain.
purposes.authAccess: Keeps the authenticated user session (JWT, httpOnly).
purposes.authRefresh: Allows the session token to be refreshed without re-login (httpOnly).
purposes.stripeFraud: Fraud detection and prevention during payment processing.
purposes.ga4Visitor: Anonymously identifies the visitor to measure site usage.
purposes.gaDistinguish: Distinguishes visitors for aggregate usage analytics.

cookies.s4Body: Some cookies are issued by third parties that provide services to us (Google for analytics, Stripe for payment processing, Cookiebot for consent management). These third parties may process data in countries outside the European Economic Area; please consult their respective policies for further information.
cookies.s5Body: You can accept, reject or configure the use of cookies at any time from the preferences panel. Your choice is stored for 12 months unless you delete it manually.
cookies.s5BrowserNote: You can also delete cookies directly from your browser. Instructions are available in each browser's official documentation:
cookies.s6Body: We may update this Cookie Policy to reflect changes in our practices or for legal reasons. The "last updated" date at the top of the page indicates when the current version was published.
cookies.s7Body: For any questions about this policy you can contact us at
